channel.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Datasets

  • WikiBio - wikipedia biography dataset - This dataset gathers 728,321 biographies from wikipedia. It aims at evaluating text generation algorithms.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Papers and Articles

  • 2021: Vision: NLG Can Help Humanise Data and AI

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Evaluation

  • GEM - a benchmark environment for NLG with a focus on its Evaluation, both through human annotations and automated Metrics.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Evaluation

  • BLEURT: a Transfer Learning-Based Metric for Natural Language Generationstars336

    • Papers and Articles

  • 2020: The Curious Case of Neural Text Degeneration

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Papers and Articles

  • 2020: A Gold Standard Methodology for Evaluating Accuracy in Data-To-Text Systems

    • Neural Natural Language Generation

  • PaperRobot: Incremental Draft Generation of Scientific Ideasstars379 - We present a PaperRobot who performs as an automatic research assistant.
  • Question Generation using hugstransformersstars424 - Question generation is the task of automatically generating questions from a text paragraph.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Papers and Articles

  • 2020: Evaluating the state-of-the-art of End-to-End Natural Language Generation: The E2E NLG challenge

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Papers and Articles

  • 2020: How to generate text: using different decoding methods for language generation with Transformers
  • 2020: Natural language generation: The commercial state ofthe art in 2020
  • 2020: Turing-NLG: A 17-billion-parameter language model by Microsoft
  • 2019: A Closer Look at Recent Results of Verb Selection for Data-to-Text NLG
  • 2019: A Personalized Data-to-Text Support Tool for Cancer Patients
  • 2019: Controlling Contents in Data-to-Document Generation with Human-Designed Topic Labels
  • 2019: Generated Texts Must Be Accurate!
  • 2019: Hotel Scribe: Generating High Variation Hotel Descriptions
  • 2019: Revisiting Challenges in Data-to-Text Generation with Fact Grounding
  • 2017: Survey of the State of the Art in NaturalLanguage Generation: Core tasks, applicationsand evaluation
  • 2016: Natural Language Generation enhances human decision-making with uncertain information

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Neural Natural Language Generation

  • This Word Does Not Existstars651 - This is a project allows people to train a variant of GPT-2 that makes up words, definitions and examples from scratch.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Neural Natural Language Generation

  • aitextgenstars1.1k - A robust Python tool for text-based AI training and generation using GPT-2.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Datasets

  • The Schema-Guided Dialogue Datasetstars288 - The Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) dataset consists of over 20k annotated multi-domain, task-oriented conversations between a human and a virtual assistant.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

  • Number Wordsstars186 - Convert a number to an approximated text expression: from '0.23' to 'less than a quarter'.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Products

  • RosaeNLG - An open-source library for node.js or client side (browser) execution, based on the Pug template engine, to generate texts in English, French, German and Italian.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Videos

  • Imitation Learning and its Application to Natural Language Generation

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Evaluation

  • compare-mtstars345 - A tool for holistic analysis of language generations systems.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Dialog

  • Platostars892 - This is the Plato Research Dialogue System, a flexible platform for developing conversational AI agents.
  • RNNLGstars490 - RNNLG is an open source benchmark toolkit for Natural Language Generation (NLG) in spoken dialogue system application domains.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Datasets

  • WebNLGstars49 - The enriched version of the WebNLG - a resource for evaluating common NLG tasks, including Discourse Ordering, Lexicalization and Referring Expression Generation.
  • Alex Context NLG Datasetstars23 - A dataset for NLG in dialogue systems in the public transport information domain.
  • Box-score datastars81 - This dataset consists of (human-written) NBA basketball game summaries aligned with their corresponding box- and line-scores.
  • WeatherGov - Computer-generated weather forecasts from weather.gov (US public forecast), along with corresponding weather data.
  • The Wikipedia company corpus - Company descriptions collected from Wikipedia. The dataset contains semantic representations, short, and long descriptions for 51K companies in English.

    • Neural Natural Language Generation

  • Texarstars2.2k - Texar is a toolkit aiming to support a broad set of machine learning, especially natural language processing and text generation tasks.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Videos

  • Data-To-Text: Generating Textual Summaries of Complex Data - Ehud Reiter

    • Datasets

  • Neural-Wikipedianstars9 - The repository contains the code along with the required corpora that were used in order to build a system that "learns" how to generate English biographies for Semantic Web triples.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Dec 9th - Dec 15th, 2019
item.description:
Neural Natural Language Generation

  • PPLMstars704 - Plug and Play Language Model implementation. Allows to steer topic and attributes of GPT-2 models.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Dec 2nd - Dec 8th, 2019
item.description:
Videos

  • Natural Language Generation (Introduction)
  • Strata Data Conference | The future of natural language generation: 2017-2027
  • The Quest for Automated Story Generation - Mark Riedl

    • Neural Natural Language Generation

  • textgenrnnstars4.4k - Easily train your own text-generating neural network of any size and complexity on any text dataset with a few lines of code.

    • Dialog

  • Chatitostars692 - Generate datasets for AI chatbots, NLP tasks, named entity recognition or text classification models using a simple DSL!

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 25th - Dec 1st, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

  • Cron Expression Descriptorstars609 - A .NET library that converts cron expressions into human readable descriptions.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 18th - Nov 24th, 2019
item.description:
Realizers

  • Genlstars22 - Surface realiser (part of a Natural Language Generation system) using Tree Adjoining Grammar.
  • JSrealBstars13 - A JavaScript bilingual text realizer for web development.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Neural Natural Language Generation

  • graph-2-textstars134 - Graph to sequence implemented in Pytorch combining Graph convolutional networks and opennmt-py.
  • Transformersstars45.7k - State-of-the-art Natural Language Processing for TensorFlow 2.0 and PyTorch.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Products

  • Accelerated Textstars290 - Automatically generate multiple natural language descriptions of your data varying in wording and structure.
  • Twine - An open-source tool for telling interactive, nonlinear stories.

    • Datasets

  • E2E - This shared task focuses on recent end-to-end (E2E), data-driven NLG methods, which jointly learn sentence planning and surface realisation from non-aligned data.
  • YelpNLG - YelpNLG provides resources for natural language generation of restaurant reviews.

    • Evaluation

  • NLG-evalstars861 - Evaluation code for various unsupervised automated metrics for Natural Language Generation.
  • VizSeqstars326 - A Visual Analysis Toolkit for Text Generation Tasks.

    • Grammar

  • GrammaticalFramework - A programming language for multilingual grammar applications.
  • CCGwebstars5 - A Web platform for parsing and annotation.

    • Narrative Generation

  • Tracerystars1.8k - A story-grammar generation library for JavaScript.

    • Realizers

  • SimpleNLG-EnFrstars24 - SimpleNLG-EnFr 1.1 is a bilingual English/French adaption of SimpleNLG v4.2.

    • Templating Languages

  • calyxstars52 - A Ruby library for generating text with recursive template grammars.
  • nalgenestars49 - Natural language generation language.
  • StringTemplate - Java template engine (with ports for C##, Objective-C, JavaScript, Scala) for generating source code, web pages, emails, or any other formatted text output.

    • Neural Natural Language Generation

  • Image Caption Generatorstars141 - A Neural Network based generative model for captioning images using Tensorflow.
  • Summary Generation From Structured Datastars169 - For converting information present in the form of structured data into natural language text.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Grammar

  • CCG Labstars16 - All combinators, common grammar format, parsing to logical form, parameter estimation for probabilistic CCG.
  • OpenCCGstars189 - OpenCCG library for parsing and realization with CCG.
  • EasyCCGstars52 - CCG: All combinators, common grammar format, parsing to logical form, parameter estimation for probabilistic CCG.

    • Narrative Generation

  • Random Story Generatorstars51 - Using Natural Language Generation (NLG) to create a random short story.

    • Realizers

  • SimpleNLGstars719 - Java API for Natural Language Generation.
  • SimpleNLG DEstars11 - German version of SimpleNLG 4.

item.title: tokenmill/awesome-nlg Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Dialog

  • NNDIALstars334 - NNDial is an open source toolkit for building end-to-end trainable task-oriented dialogue models.
  • TGenstars183 - Statistical NLG for spoken dialogue systems.
